title: Jori Lekauf
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type=GFFA |image= |name=Jori Lekauf |homeworld= |birth= |death=[[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]] ('''75'''), [[Vulpter/Legends|Vulpter]]''[[Legacy of the Force: Sacrifice]]'' |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]]''[[Legacy of the Force: Bloodlines]]'' |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair=[[Color/Legends|Sandy blond]]{{TCW|Sacrifice (episode)}} |feathers= |eyes= |skin=Fair/freckled |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=*[[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances]] **[[967 Commando]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|You're nuts, Jori.''"
"''Yeah, like Granddad.|Ben Skywalker and Jori Lekauf|}} '''Jori Lekauf''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Officer/Legends|officer]] of the [[Galactic Alliance Guard]], the [[Law enforcement agency/Legends|secret police]] of the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances]]. The grandson of [[Erv Lekauf]], an [[Imperial officer/Legends|Imperial officer]] who served under [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader's]] command, Jori followed his grandfather's example by serving with [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]]—Vader's grandson, a [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] and the [[Commander/Legends|commander]] of the Guard. Following the formation of the Guard, Lekauf served with the [[967 Commando]], a [[Company/Legends|company]] of [[Special forces/Legends|elite]] GAG [[Trooper/Legends|troopers]] who served under Solo's direct command. Lekauf rose through the [[Military rank/Legends|ranks]] of the Guard, having been promoted from [[Corporal/Legends|Corporal]] to [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] during his service in the [[Second Galactic Civil War]]. Noted for his optimistic outlook, he befriended the young [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Ben Skywalker]], Vader's other grandson who also served as an officer in the Guard. In [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]] Lekauf [[Death/Legends|sacrificed]] his life on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Vulpter/Legends|Vulpter]] in order to complete a GAG [[Mission to Vulpter|mission]]. ==Biography== [[File:Lekauf.jpg|thumb|right|200px|Jori Lekauf was the grandson of Erv Lekauf, an Imperial officer loyal to Darth Vader.]] Jori was the grandson of [[Erv Lekauf]], who served under [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader's]] command. He looked up to his grandfather more so than he did his own parents. Jori opted to follow in his grandfather's footsteps and became a Corporal in the [[Galactic Alliance Guard]], serving under Vader's own grandson, [[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]]. Jori was fiercely loyal to Solo, though at times, he often questioned the nature of his decisions. During one GAG raid on Coruscant, Lekauf befriended [[Ben Skywalker]], Jacen's cousin and informal apprentice. Lekauf offered to help Ben get over his first combat kill. They grew very close as Ben considered him to be one of his best friends. Shortly after being commissioned Lieutenant, Jori was tasked with leading a small group of GAG personnel to [[Vulpter/Legends|Vulpter]], where they were to monitor the meeting between [[Five World Prime Minister|Prime Minister]] [[Dur Gejjen]] and [[Chief of State (Galactic Alliance)|Chief of State]] [[Cal Omas]]. To prepare Ben for his role in the mission, Jori insisted on having a hand in Ben's combat training. Within a day, he managed to turn Skywalker into an efficient [[Sniper/Legends|sniper]], though the boy had his doubts about killing Gejjen in cold blood. Although their mission was a success, it was not a clean getaway; as Jori and Ben tried to escape security locked down the entire spaceport. Realizing that they would be caught, Lekauf took the sniper rifle from Ben, used a hostage to bluff his way out of the terminal (all the while shouting that he was a Corellian patriot opposed to the GA), and then managed to board their ship. Jori then [[Death/Legends|self-destructed the ship]] so that security would believe the killer was already dead and Ben would go free. ==Appearances== *''[[Legacy of the Force: Bloodlines]]'' {{1st}} *''[[Legacy of the Force: Tempest]]'' *''[[Legacy of the Force: Sacrifice]]'' *''[[Legacy of the Force: Fury]]'' {{Mo}} *''[[Legacy of the Force: Revelation]]'' {{Mo}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Jori Lekauf |pl=Jori Lekauf }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Lekauf, Jori}} [[Category:Enlisted personnel]] [[Category:Galactic Alliance Guard personnel]] [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Sharpshooters and snipers]]
